creator: John Brown

notes: Citation supplied by scholar: Correspondence and Map, John Brown to Seth Thompson, January 4, 1836, http://hdl.handle.net/20.500.12322/auc.028:0053. Robert W. Woodruff Library of the Atlanta University Center, Inc. Metadata supplied by scholar identifies local identifier auc.028.0053, 5 pages, English, archival materials, subject topics Abolitionists and Commerce, geographic subject Ohio--Franklin Mills, temporal subject 1830-1839, series John Brown Collection, Correspondence: Seth Thompson, 1814-1831 Series. PDF text extraction produced only form-feed characters; normalized file is a placeholder, not a usable transcription. Raw PDF is tracked in the public repository by human direction based on supplied NoC-US item metadata. On 2026-07-21 Codex generated a Tesseract 5.5.2 OCR derivative from 300 DPI page renders; page 4 and page 5 typed dealer notes are more legible than the handwritten pages; OCR remains discovery-only.
